reference: Hi, I am twenty-three years old male. Nowadays, I am masturbating every day. If I masturbate for three or four days regularly and try to do it the next day, then it causes me pain during erection and the semen volume is also less. If I go to the toilet after that, it is okay. What is it? Is it due to excessive masturbation? Can I masturbate every day? Is it a problem?
text: 5. I am 23 years old now. Nowadays, I am masturbating every day. If I masturbate for three or four days regularly and try to do it the next day, then it causes me pain during erection and the semen volume is also left. If I go to the toilet after that, it is okay.
